sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_8d7de18593c58b50a1483f018bba1088
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>true</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>true</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>true</applies_target_record><applies_to>set</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Auto Preenchimento Dados do Solicitante</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onLoad() {
    // Aponta exatamente para o nome da sua função no Script Include: buscarDados
    var ga = new GlideAjax('GetDadosAlunoAjax');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'buscarDados'); 
    ga.getXMLAnswer(analisarDados);
}

function analisarDados(answer) {
    if (!answer) {
        console.error('[EDTECH TESTE] O Script Include retornou uma resposta vazia.');
        return;
    }

    try {
        var dadosAluno = JSON.parse(answer);
        
        // --- LOG DE DIAGNÓSTICO ---
        // Abra o F12 no navegador para inspecionar exatamente o que o servidor encontrou
        console.log('[EDTECH TESTE] Objeto retornado pelo servidor:', dadosAluno);

        // --- PREENCHIMENTO DO FORMULÁRIO ---
        // IMPORTANTE: Substitua os nomes entre aspas simples abaixo pelos nomes REAIS das variáveis no seu catálogo
        
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_solicitante', dadosAluno.solicitante);
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_email', dadosAluno.email);
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_telefone', dadosAluno.telefone);
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_ra', dadosAluno.rass);
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_curso', dadosAluno.curso);
        g_form.setValue('nome_da_variavel_periodo', dadosAluno.periodo);

		if (dadosAluno.campus) {
            g_form.setValue('campus', dadosAluno.campus, dadosAluno.campus_display);
        }

        
      

    } catch (e) {
        console.error('[EDTECH TESTE] Erro ao processar o JSON: ' + e);
    }
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>arthur_andrade</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-22 16:50:42</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>8d7de18593c58b50a1483f018bba1088</sys_id><sys_mod_count>13</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Auto Preenchimento Dados do Solicitante</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_8d7de18593c58b50a1483f018bba1088</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>arthur_marinho</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-27 14:16:08</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onLoad</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set display_value="Dados do Solicitante">9b7b3fa49309c750a1483f018bba10fa</variable_set><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_a5817d0193098b50a1483f018bba10f3
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>true</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>true</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>true</applies_target_record><applies_to>set</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Auto Preenchimento Contato e Retorno</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onLoad() {
    var ga = new GlideAjax('GetDadosAlunoAjax');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'buscarDados');
    ga.getXMLAnswer(function(response) {
        if (response) {
            var dados = JSON.parse(response);
            g_form.setValue('email_contato', dados.email);
            g_form.setValue('telefone_contato', dados.telefone);
        }
    });
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>arthur_andrade</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-22 17:11:18</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>a5817d0193098b50a1483f018bba10f3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Auto Preenchimento Contato e Retorno</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_a5817d0193098b50a1483f018bba10f3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>eduardo.vinicius</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-26 15:42:47</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onLoad</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set display_value="Contato e Retorno">255c08f89389c750a1483f018bba1044</variable_set><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_7f4e250993c58b50a1483f018bba1086
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>true</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>true</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>true</applies_target_record><applies_to>set</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Auto Preenchimento Dados Acadêmicos</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onLoad() {
	var ga = new GlideAjax('GetDadosAlunoAjax');
	ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'buscarDados');
	ga.getXMLAnswer(function (response) {
		if (response) {
			var dados = JSON.parse(response);
			g_form.setValue('ra', dados.ra);
			g_form.setValue('curso', dados.curso);
			g_form.setValue('periodo', dados.periodo);
		}
	});
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>arthur_andrade</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-22 17:04:48</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>7f4e250993c58b50a1483f018bba1086</sys_id><sys_mod_count>7</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Auto Preenchimento Dados Acadêmicos</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_7f4e250993c58b50a1483f018bba1086</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>eduardo.vinicius</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-26 15:42:41</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onLoad</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set display_value="Dados Acadêmicos do Solicitante">8abac0389389c750a1483f018bba104c</variable_set><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

]]>singlefalsefalseactivate.life.cycle.migrationfalsefalsefalsefalseenginefalseevent.parm1false<div style="font-family: 'Google Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: #333333; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <p>Olá,</p>
    
    <p>Para darmos continuidade ao seu pedido de <strong>${u_tipo_documento}</strong> (Número: <strong>${number}</strong>), nossa equipe precisa de algumas informações adicionais ou correções.</p>
    
    <p style="background-color: #fff3cd; color: #856404; padding: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #ffeeba; border-radius: 4px; margin: 16px 0;">
        <strong>O que fazer?</strong><br>
        Acesse o link abaixo para ler a mensagem da Secretaria e envie as informações solicitadas diretamente pelo portal para que possamos retomar o seu atendimento.
    </p>
    
    <p style="margin-top: 24px;"><a href="${URI_REF}" style="display: inline-block; background-color: #d39e00; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold;">Responder no Portal</a></p>
    
    <p style="margin-top: 32px; border-top: 1px solid #eeeeee; padding-top: 16px; font-size: 12px; color: #777777;">Ficamos no aguardo da sua resposta para concluir o processo.</p>
</div>
